title: Narrative Arc — Executive Value Before the Resume
recognition: A resume compresses executive experience into a format that rarely shows how the person thinks.
reframe: The resume should confirm an already legible operating philosophy rather than introduce it for the first time.
framework: Articles, frameworks, visual models, whitepapers, interviews, and the resume form a coherent system of proof.
proof: The draft distinguishes claimed experience from visible reasoning and shows how public artifacts can create context before formal review.
application: Executives can publish substantive work that demonstrates judgment without turning the effort into self-promotional noise.
consequence: The market can recognize fit earlier and the resume carries less of the burden of explaining complex executive value.
invitation: Treat the resume as one artifact in a larger proof system, not the first or only signal.
